Build Full tank kalau EXP kamu hybrid / DMG. Sebelum beli immortal, beli dreadnaught terlebih dahulu agar lebih sustain.

data.title: A LOLITA GUIDE

emblems.emblem_desc: Cool down, healing effect, movement speed.

spell.spell_desc: Easy escape and team fight initiation.

cooperates.cooperate_desc: While Lolita blocks incoming projectiles with her S2, Hanabi can safely stand behind her and bounce basic attacks across the entire enemy team without fear of being interrupted.

counters.counter_desc: Lolita's main game-winning play is her massive AoE stun from her Ultimate. Diggie is the direct answer to this because his Ultimate, Time Journey, grants all nearby allies a massive shield and CC Immunity.

Chang'e relies entirely on her Ultimate, Meteor Shower, to deal damage from a distance. Because this skill consists of hundreds of individual projectiles, Lolita's Guardian's Bulwark (Skill 2) can block every single one of them.

dominants.dominant_desc: In this phase, Lolita becomes the primary playmaker. With her core items finished (Dominance Ice and Athena's Shield), she can dive deep into enemy lines to set up stuns or stand back to perfectly time her Guardian's Bulwark against high-damage projectiles.

emblems.emblem_desc:
By utilizing the Custom Tank Emblem as a foundation, you provide Lolita with the essential defensive stats needed to survive the frontlines while her Vitality talent significantly boosts her Max HP, which in turn strengthens the shields she provides to her teammates via her passive.
This durability is perfectly complemented by Pull Yourself Together, a crucial choice that lowers the cooldown of your Flicker, ensuring your game-changing "Flicker-Ult" combo is available more frequently to catch enemies off guard.
Finally, Concussive Blast adds a layer of offensive pressure, allowing you to deal extra magic damage during your stuns and helping you clear minion waves, making this the ultimate balanced setup for a high-impact Roamer.

equips.equip_desc:
By equipping Tough Boots (Encourage) and Dominance Ice, you gain the tenacity to ignore enemy stuns while simultaneously weakening the enemy's healing and attack speed, which allows you to safely transition into the mid-game where Blade Armor and Antique Cuirass make you nearly immune to physical damage.
You then round out the build with Brute Force Breastplate for essential Cooldown Reduction and Athena's Shield for magic protection, resulting in a Lolita that is fast, highly disruptive, and capable of standing against any type of enemy damage.

hero.hero_overview:
Lolita is the quintessential "Anti-Carry" Tank. While most tanks focus on soaking up damage with their bodies, Lolita focuses on negating damage entirely. Her kit is designed to hard-counter projectile-based heroes (Marksmen like Kimmy or Beatrix, and Mages like Cyclops or Chang'e).
She shines in the Roamer position, utilizing her Guardian's Bulwark to create an impenetrable shield for her team. If the enemy lineup relies heavily on ranged basic attacks or flying skill shots, Lolita is arguably the strongest counter-pick in the game. She doesn't just protect; she turns the enemy's offense into a wasted effort.
hero.hero_strength: Her defining strength is Guardian's Bulwark (Skill 2). It completely nullifies ranged basic attacks and projectile skills. This makes her the absolute best counter to high-tier Marksmen like Wanwan, Beatrix, Brody, and Moskov.
hero.hero_weakness: Her biggest playmaking tool (Noumenon Blast) has a long 2-second charge time. Any hard CC (Stun, Knock-up, or Silence) from heroes like Chou, Akai, or Kaja will cancel the channel, wasting her most important cooldown.

data.recommend: I Hope you like it Lolita Main :)

spell.spell_desc: Flicker is the mandatory spell for Lolita. Its primary purpose is to execute the "Flicker-Ult" combo. Since Lolita's Ultimate has a long, visible charging period, enemies will easily dodge it. By using Flicker at the very last second of the channel, you can instantly teleport the stun zone onto the enemy team. This gives them zero time to react and is the most reliable way to turn the tide of a match.

hero.hero_overview: من الأفضل لعب لوليتا كدبابة/دعم متجول، حيث تضع نفسها أمام زملائها في الفريق الأكثر ضعفًا لامتصاص الضرر والحجب
hero.hero_strength: تتمتع بمزايا دفاعية قوية، لا سيما قدرتها على صد المقذوفات بدرعها، وتوفير صعقة واسعة النطاق بقوتها القصوى، مما يجعلها درعًا ممتازًا للرماة والفرق التي تعتمد على المقذوفات بكثرة. كما توفر دعمًا قويًا لبدء قتال جماعي من خلال دروع تغطي الفريق بأكمله من قوتها السلبية، وتقليلًا كبيرًا لضرر الفريق، وصعقة موثوقة بقوتها القصوى. تشمل نقاط ضعفها ضعف حركتها، وسقف مهارة عالٍ يتطلب دقة في التوقيت والتمركز، واحتمالية انقطاع قوتها القصوى
hero.hero_weakness: نقاط ضعف لوليتا الرئيسية هي ضعف حركتها وضعفها أمام المقاطعات في قدرتها النهائية، خاصةً من أبطال التشويش مثل كاجا وتشو، وعدم قدرتها على صد الضرر الحقيقي الذي يخترق درعها. بالإضافة إلى ذلك، يمكن لسحرة التحكم بالمنطقة مثل فالير تجاوز نطاقها ومعاقبة مواقعها الثابتة، والأبطال ذوي الانفجارات العالية.

hero.hero_overview: Lolita is a defensive hero with a powerful shield that can block long-range attacks, making her an excellent support for the team. She excels at protecting allies and disrupting enemies in battle.
hero.hero_strength:
1. Strong Defense. Her shield can block projectiles, reducing enemy damage.


2. Crowd Control. She has abilities that stun and slow enemies, making her valuable in team fights.


3. Excellent Support. She protects allies with her skills, making her a great frontline defender.
hero.hero_weakness:
1. Skill Timing Dependency  She relies on proper timing to maximize her shield and stun abilities.

2. Low Damage Output. Unlike other tanks, she lacks strong offensive capabilities.

3. Weak Without Team Support  She performs best in coordinated team fights and struggles when alone.

data.title: Forgotten one

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Hanabi pairs exceptionally well with Lolita due to their powerful synergy, especially when it comes to Lolita's Shield passive. This passive allows Lolita to provide Hanabi with an additional shield when they are nearby, which significantly enhances Hanabis's effectiveness in team fights. The extra shield not only gives Hanabi more survivability but also activates her Equinox passive, which grants her cc immunity when she gains a shield from any source.

counters.counter_desc: Esmeralda is a tanky mage who can absorb shields, making her a strong counter to Lolita. Esmeralda's Frostmoon shield can absorb Lolita's  Shield, rendering much of Lolita's defensive capabilities useless. She can deal significant damage to Lolita with her Falling Star Moon, and her ability to sustain in fights makes it hard for Lolita to outlast her.

Granger is a projectile-based hero, which puts him at a significant disadvantage when facing Lolita. Her second skill can effectively block and deflect all of Granger's projectiles, including his basic attacks and skills. This ability renders his damage output ineffective, as he relies heavily on his projectiles to deal burst damage and secure kills. With Lolita's shield nullifying his attacks, Granger struggles to contribute meaningfully in fights

Cyclops is another hero who struggles significantly against Lolita, as his abilities are also projectile-based and can be nullified by Lolita's Guardian's Reflection. This includes key skills like his Stardust Shock and Planets Attack, which are crucial for dealing damage and maintaining pressure in fights. With Lolita's shield deflecting these projectiles, Cyclops effectiveness is drastically reduced, as his primary damage sources are rendered ineffective.

Lolita's Guardian's reflection makes her a nightmare for Harley because it blocks all projectiles, including the cards from his Poker Trick and the damage from his Deadly Magic ultimate. Without the initial damage from Poker Trick, Harley can't fully utilize his ultimate's burst potential, as the follow-up explosion relies on the target being weakened. If Harley engages Lolita and she activates her shield at the right moment, his entire combo is nullified rendering him useless.

dominants.dominant_desc: Starting in the jungle or mid lane, she can effectively protect her jungler while assisting with fast clearing in the mid lane. Her passive and 2nd skill ensures her jungler cannot be invaded easily,blocking enemy damage, and allowing for secure rotations. Frequent visits in the gold lane is crucial for ensuring the safety of the gold laner. Positioning herself strategically, she can prevent early ganks. Her power spike is mostly at Level 2 where she gains her 2nd and 1st to abuse it's 1-2 combo
dominants.dominant_title: Lolita is an excellent choice for jungler protection and ensuring a safe rotation or a Gold Lane Babysitter, all throughout the stages of the game.

emblems.emblem_desc: Guardian's Firmness for enhanced magic defense, ensuring she can withstand enemy mages and provide additional protection for her team. Tenacity is crucial to boost her durability, giving her the resilience needed to tank damage and stay alive longer in team fights. Concussive Blast pairs perfectly with her Power Charge! (first skill), as it amplifies her damage, making her initiations more impactful by dealing extra burst damage to enemies in her path.

equips.equip_desc: A well-rounded build on Lolita that balances magic and physical defense while ensuring survivability and initiation, the key item to prioritize is Thunder Belt. This item offers a unique combination of both physical and magical defense, making it perfect for tanky heroes like Lolita who often face enemies dealing both types of damage. Additionally, its passive true damage effect synergizes excellently with Lolita's Power charge (1st skill) which can be easily stacked throughout the game.

hero.hero_overview: Lolita is a tank/support hero who thrives in both protection and initiation, serving as a safe haven for her jungler in the early game and providing unparalleled support to marksmen (MM) and mages all throughout the game.Her high durability and crowd control abilities allow her to absorb damage and keep enemies at bay.
hero.hero_strength: Her strength lies in countering enemies with projectile-based skills or long-range attacks, such as marksmen and mages. Lolita truly shines in team fights, where her abilities and shielding capabilities protect fragile heroes like mages and marksmen, ensuring their survival and maximizing their impact throughout the game.
hero.hero_weakness: Lolita's main disadvantage lies in being a skill-dependent tank requiring precise timing to maximize her impact. Her effectiveness heavily relies on her team's ability to capitalize on her setup's; without proper coordination her efforts may go to waste. She's also vulnerable to heroes with strong crowd control abilities which can disrupt her skills. Match-ups without projectile skills will make her Guardians reflection useless.

spell.spell_desc: Flicker provides Lolita with the mobility she needs to engage in team fights or escape from dangerous situations. This spell enhances her versatility, allowing her to quickly reposition or close the gap to catch enemies off guard. It pairs exceptionally well with her Noumenon Blast (third skill), as it can extend the skill's range, making it more unpredictable and harder for enemies to anticipate.
